---
title: "Getting Started with rmstnma"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Getting Started with rmstnma}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

## Introduction

The `rmstnma` package provides specialized tools for conducting network meta-analysis 
with Restricted Mean Survival Time (RMST) as the primary outcome.

## Basic Usage

```{r eval=FALSE}
library(rmstnma)

# Load example data
data(example_network)
head(example_network)

# Create network
net <- rmst_network(
  data = example_network,
  study = "study_id",
  trt = "treatment",
  time = "time",
  surv = "survival"
)

print(net)
```
